description_long: This handbag features a wide, angular body crafted from olive green material with a soft, gathered texture. The front is adorned with a series of prominent, dark blue geometric studs arranged in a semi-circular pattern, culminating in a large central blue accent at the base of the flap. The bag has a single, broad strap that extends upward, suitable for shoulder carrying. The back of the handbag is plain, lacking any decorative elements or fasteners. The overall silhouette is structured yet slightly slouched, suggesting a flexible but substantial construction. The design is modern and bold, making it a statement accessory for urban environments.
description: A structured olive green handbag with a single strap and bold blue geometric studs on the front, featuring a large central blue accent and a gathered, soft texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the olive green body with blue geometric studs and a large central blue accent, as well as the single strap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's depth, the protruding blue central accent, and the thickness of the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain olive green surface with no decorative elements or fasteners visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the bag's depth and the blue central accent, mirroring the other side.
attribute_strap_type: Single wide shoulder strap, non-adjustable, attached at both ends to the top of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure, secured by the large central blue accent on the front.
attribute_decorative_elements: Dark blue geometric studs arranged in a semi-circular pattern and a large central blue accent.
